hooks.command: /bin/sh -c 'hook="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}/scripts/spm_codex_hook.py"; if [ ! -f "$hook" ]; then hook="$(find "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache" -type f -path "*/spm-codex/*/scripts/spm_codex_hook.py" -print 2>/dev/null | sort | tail -n 1)"; fi; if [ -z "$hook" ] || [ ! -f "$hook" ]; then data="$HOME/.codex/spm-codex"; mkdir -p "$data"; printf "%s\n" "SPM hook unavailable: no installed runtime found" >> "$data/launcher.log"; exit 0; fi; exec python3 "$hook"'

/bin/sh -c 'hook="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}/scripts/spm_codex_hook.py"; if [ ! -f "$hook" ]; then hook="$(find "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache" -type f -path "*/spm-codex/*/scripts/spm_codex_hook.py" -print 2>/dev/null | sort | tail -n 1)"; fi; if [ -z "$hook" ] || [ ! -f "$hook" ]; then data="$HOME/.codex/spm-codex"; mkdir -p "$data"; printf "%s\n" "SPM hook unavailable: no installed runtime found" >> "$data/launcher.log"; exit 0; fi; exec python3 "$hook"'

/bin/sh -c 'hook="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}/scripts/spm_codex_hook.py"; if [ ! -f "$hook" ]; then hook="$(find "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache" -type f -path "*/spm-codex/*/scripts/spm_codex_hook.py" -print 2>/dev/null | sort | tail -n 1)"; fi; if [ -z "$hook" ] || [ ! -f "$hook" ]; then data="$HOME/.codex/spm-codex"; mkdir -p "$data"; printf "%s\n" "SPM hook unavailable: no installed runtime found" >> "$data/launcher.log"; exit 0; fi; exec python3 "$hook"'
